reason: The bounded diagnostic and hard-gate repairs are complete, but full blueprint readiness is blocked by unavailable public LLM credentials and project-wide mypy failures outside this bounded feature slice. The default hard-eval mismatch and local relative public data path blockers have been repaired.

options.description: Provide OPENAI_API_KEY or DEEPSEEK_API_KEY, then rerun the full public LongMemEval 50 and LoCoMo 50 answer/judge comparison gates.
Split the 90-error full-project mypy cleanup into a separate lane before requiring full mypy as a merge gate for this diagnostic feature.
Treat this branch as a partial diagnostic and hard-eval gate repair with no aggregate public benchmark movement claim.

resolved_in_this_pass: Default hard eval now reports accuracy=1.00/source=1.00.
Blueprint-relative public data and comparison-report paths resolve through ignored local symlinks.
